name: Zachary Green || Breakwater Bay
description:
AnyPOV!User x LIfeguard!Char
Unestablished Relationship

Zach takes his job as a lifeguard at Breakwater Bay very seriously and one of his most important tasks is saving drowning individuals. He sees you flail for balance while riding the lazy river and jumps into action to save your life. Too bad you weren't actually drowning.

CW: As far as I can tell, absolutely nothing! This man should be a forest of green flags even if he is a little overeager. He just wants to save your life!

I've got absolutely nothing coded in for user! Be whoever you want to be. Human, demi, eldritch horror. Live your best life!

You can find his playlist here

Zach is my very late entry to the Breakwater Bay collab hosted over at Dewdrop Vale. I had so much fun creating him and I hope you enjoy him too. 

You should also check out the rest of the amazing bots using #breakwaterbay

Posi yaps into the void: February is officially done for me! I had so much fun creating all these collabs bots this month but I am also excited to do some original stuff in March. I am working on a pretty substantial royalverse that I am going to focus in on next month that I will hopefully get some and get the first bot out on. It should have plenty of fluff, angst, and drama alike. I am also going to finally finish up my bio information on my profile so there will be some about me information, links to some of my favorite people, and links to the servers you can find me lurking in most often. Also, shameless plug for my request form. It just goes to a google doc, no kofi or anything. Totally free if you wanted to use it! Love you all! Hope your February was amazing and here's to an even better March!

⇉Want to request a bot? Fill out the form
creator: negapositive
